title: Funky Crunchy Mediterranean Egg Braise
description: A romantic, crunchy, and flavorful mediterranean dish featuring eggs and a rich braise. Perfect for a cozy evening with friends or family.

ingredients.name: Eggs
ingredients.notes: Large eggs are ideal for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Onions
ingredients.notes: Chopped onions will add a sweet and caramelized flavor.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Minced garlic will add a pungent flavor to the braise.

ingredients.name: Mushrooms
ingredients.notes: Sliced mushrooms will add an earthy flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: Artichoke Hearts
ingredients.notes: Canned artichoke hearts will add a salty and tangy flavor.

ingredients.name: Feta Cheese
ingredients.notes: Crumbled feta cheese will add a salty and creamy flavor.

ingredients.name: Paprika
ingredients.notes: Smoked paprika will add a smoky and savory flavor.

ingredients.name: Tomato Paste
ingredients.notes: High-quality tomato paste will add a rich and intense flavor.

ingredients.name: Cherry Tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Halved cherry tomatoes will add a burst of juicy sweetness.

ingredients.name: Fresh Parsley
ingredients.notes: Chopped fresh parsley will add a fresh and herbaceous flavor.

ingredients.name: Crunchy Olive Crumbs
ingredients.notes: Homemade or store-bought crunchy olive crumbs will add a satisfying crunch.

ingredients.name: Black Pepper
ingredients.notes: Season with black pepper to taste.

ingredients.name: Red Pepper Flakes
ingredients.notes: Add a pinch of red pepper flakes for an extra kick.

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a claypot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they are softened and caramelized, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the artichoke hearts, crumbled feta cheese, smoked paprika, and tomato paste. Stir to combine.
Add the halved cherry tomatoes and stir to combine.
Crack the eggs into the claypot and stir to combine.
Season with salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes (if using).
Transfer the claypot to the preheated oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the feta cheese is golden brown.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and crunchy olive crumbs.
